title: jHECHMS: a differentiable JAX implementation of HEC-HMS model algorithms
description:
Dual-backend (JAX + NumPy) implementation of native HEC-HMS hydrological algorithms — usable standalone or as a SYMFLUENCE plugin.

Part of the SYMFLUENCE JAX-native model family, described in the paper series accompanying SYMFLUENCE (Eythorsson et al., 2026, Water Resources Research).
